backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing audio post CRUD operations (add, edit, remove, get) with authorization checks, user content tracking, and statistics queries, integrating blob storage and access control mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of custom banner image rendering in the BrandingBanner component from frontend/public/assets/generated.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components, pages, and utilities including routing, audio playback, upload forms, authentication, and UI elements with their key features and behaviors.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI elements like backgrounds, borders, cards, and charts.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the SPEAKR application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with all routes (feed, explore, upload, auth, dashboard, static pages), providers (QueryClient, InternetIdentity, Player), and layout with header, mini-player, and floating UI elements, plus onboarding redirect logic.
frontend/src/components/auth/InterestsCh: Checkbox group component for selecting user interests from a provided list with grid layout and scrollable container.
frontend/src/components/categories/Categ: Category filter chips component rendering buttons for predefined categories with active state styling and feed filter integration.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Empty state hero component for dashboard showing welcome message, upload CTA, and UI-only profile completion progress indicator with animated illustration.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/MyCont: Displays a user's uploaded audio posts with edit, delete, and play functionality. Includes a dialog for editing post titles and descriptions, and integrates with the player to play audio items.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Statis: Shows user statistics including total uploads and total listens in a card layout with icons. Handles loading and error states for the statistics data.
frontend/src/components/feed/AudioCard.t: Renders an individual audio post card with play/pause, like/dislike, comments, and delete functionality. Supports both backend items and draft items, with delete permissions based on authorship.
frontend/src/components/feed/CommentsPan: Displays a list of comments for an audio post with author avatars and timestamps. Shows a placeholder message when no comments exist.
frontend/src/components/feed/FeedHeroBan: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/feed/ProceduralC: Renders either a custom thumbnail or a procedurally generated category-based cover image for audio items. Falls back to procedural covers when custom thumbnails are unavailable or placeholders.
frontend/src/components/language/Languag: Multi-select dropdown for choosing languages with search filtering and custom language addition. Displays selected count and language labels with checkbox selection.
frontend/src/components/layout/BrandingB: Displays the SPEAKR branding banner with a dropdown menu in the top-left corner. Falls back to text if the banner image fails to load.
Navigation dropdown menu with links to About, Categories, Contact, Help/FAQ, Terms of Service, and Privacy Policy pages.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingB: Fixed floating button in the top-right corner that navigates back to the feed. Hides when the mini-player is active.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingL: A floating button with popover that allows users to filter audio content by language, featuring search, custom language addition, and a badge showing the count of selected languages. Hides when the mini-player is active.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Main application header with centered logo, navigation menu dropdown, search bar, and authentication controls (login/logout). Includes responsive design and integration with Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/layout/PrimaryNa: Navigation bar component displaying Feed, Explore, and Upload links with icons. Highlights the active route based on current path.
frontend/src/components/onboarding/Onboa: Multi-step onboarding wizard with progress indicator that introduces users to discovering audio, sharing content, and using the mini-player. Features animated speaker icons and skip/complete functionality.
frontend/src/components/player/MiniPlaye: Fixed bottom audio player bar with playback controls, progress slider, volume control, and track information. Displays procedural cover art and provides play/pause, seek, and close functionality.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchBar: Search input component with icon that updates feed filters and auto-selects default language on focus or input change if user hasn't made a language selection.
frontend/src/components/upload/AudioSour: Tabbed component for selecting audio source via file upload or browser recording. Handles MediaRecorder API with MIME type detection, 3-hour max duration, stream cleanup, and preview playback.
frontend/src/components/upload/CategoryP: A combobox component for selecting or creating custom categories, with a popover UI that displays predefined categories and allows users to add new ones via text input.
frontend/src/components/upload/UploadFor: Main audio upload form component that handles file selection, metadata input (title, description, category, languages), validates audio duration, uploads to backend with progress tracking, and navigates to dashboard on success.
frontend/src/components/upload/useAudioD: Custom hook that validates audio files against a 3-hour maximum duration limit by loading metadata and provides formatted error messages.
frontend/src/constants/categories.ts: Defines a readonly array of predefined categories (All, Entertainment, Technology, Food, Sports, Politics, Music, Work) and exports a Category type.
frontend/src/constants/categoryColors.ts: Maps categories to gradient background colors and badge styles for consistent theming, providing utility functions to retrieve color classes by category name.
frontend/src/constants/interests.ts: Combines base categories (excluding 'All') with additional interests like Art, Gaming, Science, etc. to create a comprehensive INTERESTS array.
frontend/src/constants/languages.ts: Defines a comprehensive list of 184+ ISO 639-1 language codes with labels, including a 'none' option for music without language.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages a backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomLanguages.ts: Custom hook that manages custom user-defined languages stored in localStorage, merges them with built-in languages, provides duplicate detection, and returns a sorted alphabetical list.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMyContent.ts: React Query hook for fetching, editing, and deleting the current user's audio posts, with automatic cache invalidation for content and statistics.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts: Manages onboarding completion state in localStorage with functions to mark complete, check status, and reset.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query mutations for adding audio posts, listening to posts, and removing posts with toast notifications and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserStatistics.ts: React Query hook that fetches user statistics from the backend actor when authenticated.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color palette for light/dark themes, premium typography defaults, and glass/elevation component utilities inspired by SPEAKR branding.
frontend/src/lib/draftFeedItems.ts: Manages draft audio items in localStorage, converting Files to data URLs for persistence and providing subscription-based change notifications.
frontend/src/lib/formatters.ts: Utility functions for formatting numbers with K/M/B suffixes and converting seconds to MM:SS duration format.
frontend/src/lib/proceduralCovers.ts: Generates deterministic SVG cover images based on category and seed using seeded random numbers, category-specific OKLCH color schemes, and waveform patterns.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function combining clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional CSS class merging.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/mock/mockAudio.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for audio items and comments, and exports an array of 6 mock audio items with sample data for testing the feed.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders a simple About page with a heading and placeholder text indicating content is coming soon.
frontend/src/pages/AuthPage.tsx: Provides a tabbed authentication page with login and registration forms, including an interests selection checkbox group for new users.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Renders a simple Contact page with a heading and placeholder text indicating contact channels are being set up.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Protected dashboard page that requires Internet Identity authentication, displays user statistics and content, or shows an empty state hero for new users.
frontend/src/pages/ExplorePage.tsx: Displays a grid of category cards with procedural cover images that navigate to the feed with the selected category filter applied.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Main feed page that combines mock items, draft items, and backend content, filtering by search query, category, and language with appropriate empty states.
frontend/src/pages/HelpPage.tsx: Renders a simple Help & FAQ page with a heading and placeholder text indicating the help center is being built.
frontend/src/pages/OnboardingPage.tsx: Displays the onboarding wizard for new users and handles completion or skip actions by marking onboarding complete and navigating to the feed.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPage.tsx: Renders a simple Privacy Policy page with a heading and placeholder text indicating the policy is being finalized.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Renders a simple Terms of Service page with a heading and placeholder text indicating the terms are being prepared.
frontend/src/pages/UploadPage.tsx: Renders the audio upload page with a heading and the UploadForm component for users to share audio content.
frontend/src/player/PlayerProvider.tsx: React context provider that manages audio playback state (play, pause, seek, volume) using an HTML5 Audio element and exposes controls via usePlayer hook.
frontend/src/state/feedFilters.ts: Zustand store with persistence for feed filtering state (search query, category, languages) that auto-selects browser default language on first load.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system, extended shadows, Inter font family, and custom animations for accordions and speaker pulse effects.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking SPEAKR Audio app features including pending requests for like/dislike counters, favorites, and in-progress custom banner image replacement.
